summary: Iter10 backend testing: contact resolver + backfill endpoint + per-org auto-post threshold + regression checks. 15/15 new integration tests + 3/3 existing unit test suites pass. Backfill on Clean Set was already applied (0 missing → all 131 txns have contact_id; 131 AI-created contacts). Idempotency verified. Corp-suffix dedup verified (GitHub/GitHub Inc. collapse). Merchant cache upsert on approve verified with source='user'. Uncategorized 6999/4999 auto-create verified. No AI calls billed — fast-path only.

minor.issue: Review request specified POST but server implements PATCH. Endpoint works correctly under PATCH; either update review doc or add POST alias.

No pagination metadata returned (no total, page, next_cursor). Only a `limit` query param + flat `{transactions: [...]}`. Review asked to 'verify pagination fields' — none exist. May be by design; flagging for confirmation.

action_items: Decide POST vs PATCH for /settings/auto-post-threshold — align server or review doc.
Confirm whether GET /transactions should return pagination fields; if yes add total/next_cursor.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2143 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routers (companies, transactions, contacts, plaid, reports).
contacts_backfill loads up to 20000 txns into memory in one to_list — fine for now but will need chunking as tenants grow.
approve_transaction fetches the transaction twice (once for _assert_open, once after update). Minor perf; could reuse the first fetch.
seed_data_creation: Test creates and cleans up 1 TEST_ITER10 txn + 1 GitHub, Inc. contact + 1 TEST_MERCH_* txn on Marketing Co, LLC (id 2f8153a1). All test data deleted at end of each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter10 test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_contacts.py is stable and safe to rerun (idempotent cleanup, no AI billing). Clean Set (1360f004-...) already had contact backfill applied — 131 contacts, 0 missing. To retest backfill's create path, either use a fresh company or delete_many on db.contacts+txn.contact_id first. Note the DEMO_ID const in the test file was named 'Skyward Sparks' in the review request but the actual company name is 'Marketing Co, LLC' — id is correct.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Two minor doc/API-shape mismatches flagged as minor.
